productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Casual Grey Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and synthetic leather upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperCanvas upper with a synthetic leather patch on the forefoot and back heel for absolute breathable comfort Padded tongue with a synthetic leather upper and fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePhylon midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves on the lateral forefoot and brick-styled grooves on the lateral side for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the synthetic leather using a damp, clean clothTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
